title: Fortuitous event
doc_html:
Art. 1875.  Fortuitous event

A fortuitous event is one that, at the time the contract was made, could not have been reasonably foreseen.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
doc_text:
Art. 1875.  Fortuitous event
A fortuitous event is one that, at the time the contract was made, could not have been reasonably foreseen.
Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
